claim: Upregulation of mosGCTL-1 is induced upon infection with West Nile virus.
evidence_sentences: In vivo experiments show that mosGCTL-1 and mosPTP-1 function as part of the same pathway and are critical for WNV infection of mosquitoes.
During the mosquito blood-feeding process, WNV infection was blocked in vivo with mosGCTL-1 antibodies.
